subject: Human Resources
title: Reskilling and Upskilling
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Reskilling and Upskilling.

hook.text: The World Economic Forum says half the global workforce needs reskilling by 2025. That's 1 billion people.

buildup.text: Reskilling teaches new capabilities for a different role. Upskilling deepens existing capabilities for an evolving role.

discovery.text: AT&T invested $1 billion in reskilling 100,000 employees—pivoting from hardware to software without mass layoffs.

twist.text: Most corporate training is ineffective—employees forget 70% within 24 hours.

climax.text: Organizations building learning cultures—where skill development is ongoing—outlast those treating training as an annual event.

punchline.text: The best job security isn't a contract. It's a skill set that keeps evolving.

quiz.question: How much did AT&T invest in reskilling employees?
